themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, execute workflows, and interact with systems.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that aid developers in writing, reviewing, and optimizing code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles about specific AI-powered platforms and software designed to assist in various research activities.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Focuses on AI capabilities that condense large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Discussions on how AI is affecting jobs, skills, and the overall labor market across different industries.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles exploring the use, capabilities, and research implications of AI-powered conversational agents.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Content detailing how AI is being applied to enhance product development, strategy, and management processes.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Articles related to AI-generated voices, avatars, or personas used to simulate human interaction in research or testing.

themes.name: AI design and research
themes.description: Explores how AI is directly applied to the design process and the integration of AI into UX research methodologies.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Content focused on using AI to analyze customer data and extract actionable insights for businesses.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
